corrections.correct: ἄφες ἀδίκημα τῷ πλησίον σου σον,
corrections.note: Printed text has duplicated σον at line end: 'σου σον,'; transcript omits the second word.
Sigla read B b A C, not 'BbAC' with lowercase b attached ambiguously.
Superscript correction is δι, matching διελει; transcript misread the letters.
Asterisk after ℵ is present in the apparatus.
The parenthetical ℵ1 reading appears as -ρησι, not -ρητει.

corrections.note: The siglum is ℵ*, not upsilon-star.

uncertain.note: The body clearly prints 'σου σον' across the line; likely a typographical dittography in Swete, but as printed it is present.

notes: Right-margin verse references in parentheses are present in the scan but were not transcribed; since they are not present in the supplied transcription schema and are not body text, not treated as errors. Page number 700 matches.
